title: Tiktok Video Intern
description:
Ready to make your mark in the world of social media and content creation? As a TikTok Video Intern with Confirm Good Pte Ltd, you’ll dive into the exciting world of videography and photography, helping create viral content for our TikTok platforms!

You’ll have the chance to work alongside project managers and content strategists, planning, shooting, and editing engaging videos that capture the latest trends. With hands-on experience using tools like Capcut, Adobe Photoshop, and gimbals, you’ll be able to bring your creativity to life and contribute to projects that stand out.

If you’re passionate about digital content, have an eye for trends, and want to be part of a fun, dynamic team, apply now for this 6-month internship that could lead to a permanent role.

Apply today and let’s create something amazing!

Responsibilities

· Produce, shoot & edit photography and videography content for the Confirm Good TikTok platforms

· Assist in content creation, working closely with project managers and content strategists

· Plan, script and storyboard video assignments

Requirements

· Experienced with photography and videography equipment

· Familiar with pre-planning/production, lighting, storyboarding, equipment like slider and gimbal etc

· Good knowledge in video and photo-editing software, Capcut etc

· Basic knowledge of Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator

· Good communication skills

· Knowledgeable in digital content and platforms

· An eye for trends and explore different technics able to produce video/photography content that goes ViRAL

(Minimum commitment of 6 months)

* Internship may lead to conversion to permanent role.

Check our videos here:

https://www.tiktok.com/@confirmgoodsg

https://www.tiktok.com/@tastesoulsg

https://www.tiktok.com/@goodlobangsg

https://www.tiktok.com/@vanitysuitesg

https://www.tiktok.com/@goodtoflynews

To Apply, submit your CV and portfolio.

postedCompany.description:
Confirm Good is a Singapore-based media publishing platform that brings the latest deals, news and happenings to locals in our little red dot.


We offer first-hand information on deals and promotions on a daily basis and we curate and pick out the best deals for our subscribers. We are the first Telegram channel in Singapore to have exclusive partnerships with well-loved brands such as Krispy Kreme, Llao Llao, LiHO, and Tiger Sugar to offer our subscribers giveaways, one-for-one deals, and many other promotions and discounts!


We are expanding to bring our tight-knit community even closer by adding a more personal touch to our offerings through Confirm Good with not only a wider variety of partnerships, but also with articles covering various topics to appeal to a wider demographic.


With well-researched insights and advice spanning a wide range of topics, we seek to deliver simple to understand and beneficial contents for our readers.


We are always on a lookout for talents and we can offer you a broad range of exciting careers of your choice.


To qualify for a full-time position with us, we would prefer it if you have at least 2 years of working experience in a relevant field or if you can impress us with your work. 


If you are really keen to try your hand at something new and don’t have the experience, you can apply for our 6-month Internship Program.


We look forward to hearing from you :)


Don’t worry, Confirm Good Lah!
postedCompany.name: CONFIRM GOOD PTE. LTD.
